---
name: Feature or product request
about: Ask for a new feature, a new product, or a rate change
title: "[Request] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What do you want**

Say it plainly - the feature, the product, or the rate you want changed.

**If it is a product or a rate**

Rates need a source before they go in. Give me one of:

- A photo of the product label showing the rate
- A link to the Athena page (store.athenaag.com or support.athenaag.com)

Include the product name, the rate, and the units exactly as printed.

**Anything else**

Which stage or tab it belongs in, how you run it, anything that helps.
